new_content.name: Dreams of Paradise
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Vault Oneiron
new_content.description: A new treasure dungeon accessed via Gargantuaskin Treasure Maps.

new_content.name: The Wreath of Snakes (Unreal)
new_content.description: A new unreal trial replacing Hells' Kier (Unreal).

new_content.name: Chat bubbles
new_content.description: A new system allowing messages to be displayed above characters' heads.

new_content.name: Portrait Mode (Group Pose)
new_content.description: A new feature for group pose that simulates vertical framing.

housing.name: Lattice Planter Partition
housing.description: This elegant latticework partition decorated with planters brings new meaning to the word "wallflower."

housing.name: Far Eastern Odder Otter Seater
housing.description: A seat ideal for otters, odder or not, and also preferred by the floor-sitting lot.

housing.name: Plaid Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall with a bold black-on-red pattern of intersecting stripes.

housing.name: Honeycomb Carpet
housing.description: Soft flooring made of perfectly tessellating hexagonal panels.

housing.name: La Noscean Orange Tree
housing.description: This tree has been tastefully pruned for ornamental use─but there is naught stopping a theoretical homeowner from eating oranges until they pass out.

housing.name: Log Partition Door
housing.description: A partition and door combination designed in the style of a rustic cottage.

housing.name: Cabin Bed
housing.description: At once recognizable to visitors of Tuliyollal, this bed incorporates woven reeds lovingly raised in Yok Tural.

housing.name: Cabin Sofa
housing.description: An elegant woven seat of the sort commonly found in Tuliyollan dwellings.

housing.name: Dumbbell Rack
housing.description: Storage for one-armed weights of ascending heft, to be lifted until one can lift no more.

housing.name: Training Bench
housing.description: A bench from which to pose what will surely one day become an age-old question: "Dost thou even lift?"

housing.name: Scroll Cabinet
housing.description: A wooden shelving structure custom-made for storing scrolls. Comes complete with material to inflate your to-read list.

housing.name: Minimalist Glade Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door, designed to complement glade residences.

housing.name: Minimalist Oasis Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door, designed to complement oasis residences.

housing.name: Minimalist Riviera Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door, designed to complement riviera residences.

housing.name: Minimalist Highland Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door, designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Minimalist Hingan Partition Door
housing.description: A simple partition affixed with a single door, designed to complement Hingan residences.

housing.name: Cabin Sideboard
housing.description: The expansive shelves of this freestanding furnishing are perfect for displaying souvenirs from across the salt.

housing.name: Old Fishwife's Paella
housing.description: Though this rice dish rich with fresh seafood and vegetables is so good as to be legendary, it is assuredly real and quite hot to the touch.

housing.name: Everkeep Lamppost
housing.description: The neon glow of this Everkeep fixture has been softened for indoor use.

housing.name: Death's Halo
housing.description: An unsettling monument inspired by the rings Necron wielded to such chilling effect. Dark desires seem to emanate from within.

housing.name: Overhead Studio Light
housing.description: This simple fixture casts ample light for portraiture when ceiling lamps fail to suffice.

housing.name: Cabin Half-moon Rug
housing.description: A rug decorated with a traditional Turali pattern and well suited for adorning thresholds.

housing.name: Training Mat
housing.description: A mat to prevent weights damaging the flooring during intense training sessions.
